summary: Tested Adopt and Farewell page redesigns. Adopt page completely redesigned as GUIDANCE HUB with intent tiles, essentials buckets, product categories, AI advisor, and concierge help. Farewell page has full SoulMadeCollection (12 items), services hide prices, no 'coming soon' text for farewell pillar. Both pillars have 3+ bundles from API.
critical_code_review_comments: AdoptPage.jsx: Completely redesigned as Guidance Hub - NOT a store page
AdoptPage.jsx: 8 intent tiles correctly implemented (puppy, adult, senior, indie, first-time, rescue, essentials, concierge)
AdoptPage.jsx: 'What Do I Need First?' essentials section with 8 buckets
AdoptPage.jsx: Product categories organized by need (Day 1, Comfort, Home Setup, Grooming, Walking, Training, Paperwork)
AdoptPage.jsx: Adoption Advisor AI chat section present
AdoptPage.jsx: NO 'Pets Available' or 'Adoptable Pets' section (grep confirms)
AdoptPage.jsx: NO 'Partner Shelters' stats section (grep confirms)
AdoptPage.jsx: Concierge Help options section with 8 help types
FarewellPage.jsx: SoulMadeCollection configured with pillar='farewell' and maxItems=12
FarewellPage.jsx: ServiceCatalogSection configured with hidePrice=true and title='Compassionate Support'
SoulMadeCollection.jsx line 609: 'coming soon' text hidden when pillar === 'farewell'
